zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Calverley於大約1483年出生在英國越可爾卡爾福利時，他的父親Sir William Calverley II43歲，母親Alice Saville53歲。他於1500年4月30日與Isabel Elizabeth Drakes在英國越可爾卡爾福利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1536年在英國英格蘭越可爾卡爾福利享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Calverley于大约1483年出生在英国越可爾卡爾福利时，他的父亲Sir William Calverley II43岁，母亲Alice Saville53岁。他于1500年4月30日与Isabel Elizabeth Drakes在英国越可爾卡爾福利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1536年在英国英格兰越可爾卡爾福利享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Calverley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Calverley in Yorkshire, named with Old English calfra (genitive plural of calf ‘calf’) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Alternatively, in some instances the name may be a variant of the habitational name Calveley, from a place so called in Cheshire (with the same meaning as above), or from Calverleigh in Devon, meaning ‘the clearing of the bare wood’ (Old English calu ‘bare, bald’ + wudu ‘wood’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’).

variants.name: Calvery
meanings: Possibly an Americanized form of German Kälberer(see Kalberer ).

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Calverley was born about 1483, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir William Calverley II, was 43 and his mother, Alice Saville, was 53. He married Isabel Elizabeth Drakes on 30 April 1500, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 9 daughters. He died about 1536, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Calverley est né environ 1483, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Calverley II, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Alice Saville, avait 53 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Elizabeth Drakes le 30 avril 1500, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 9 filles. Il est décédé environ 1536, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Calverley um 1483 in Calverley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Calverley II 43 und seine Mutter Alice Saville 53. Er hat am 30. April 1500 in Calverley, Yorkshire, England Isabel Elizabeth Drakes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Er starb um 1536 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Calverley è nato il circa 1483 nel Calverley, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Calverley II, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Alice Saville, aveva 53 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Elizabeth Drakes il 30 aprile 1500, nel Calverley, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 9 figlie. Morì circa 1536, nel Calverley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Calverleyが約1483年にイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで生まれた時，父Sir William Calverley IIは43歳，母Alice Savilleは53歳であった。1500年4月30日にイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーでIsabel Elizabeth Drakesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は約1536年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Calverley(이)가 대략 1483년 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Calverley II(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Saville(은)는 53세였다. 그는 1500년 4월 30일 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 Isabel Elizabeth Drakes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1536년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Calverley nasceu aproximadamente 1483, em Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Calverley II, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Alice Saville, tinha 53 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Elizabeth Drakes em 30 de abril de 1500, em Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1536, em Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Calverley родился около 1483 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Calverley II было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Saville, 53. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Elizabeth Drakes 30 апреля 1500 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Он умер около 1536 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.

sm.about 1483–about 1536: e tusa o le 1483–e tusa o le 1536

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Calverley nació aproximadamente 1483, en Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Calverley II, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Alice Saville, tenía 53 años. Se casó con Isabel Elizabeth Drakes el 30 de abril de 1500, en Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1536, en Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años.
